# Sell Broken Consoles

> Nationwide bulk buyer of broken, untested, and salvage video game consoles. Hassle-free freight pickup across all 48 states for independent stores, repair shops, and liquidation centers.

Sell Broken Consoles is a B2B gaming asset recovery operation that purchases broken, untested, customer-return, and end-of-life video game consoles in bulk quantities. We pay for and manage 100% of the freight logistics — prepaid BOLs, carrier scheduling, and dock pickup — directly from sellers' loading docks or storefronts anywhere in the lower 48 United States.

We buy from independent game stores, liquidation centers, repair shops, big-box surplus channels, returns liquidators, and pawn shops. Supported inventory includes Sony PlayStation 3/4/5, Xbox 360/One/Series S/X, Nintendo Switch (all revisions), Wii/Wii U, handhelds (3DS, PSP, Vita), controllers and accessories, water-damaged units, no-power units, and disc-drive failures.

Minimum lot size is 50 units. Offers are returned within 24 hours of receiving an inventory manifest. Payment is issued via Wire or ACH on receipt and count; Net 7 terms are available for recurring partners. Downstream processing is R2v3-aligned, and freight runs through SmartWay-certified carriers with cargo coverage up to $100k per shipment.

Contact: buyers@sellbrokenconsoles.com · Hours: Mon–Fri 9a–6p ET.

- [Home — Nationwide Bulk Broken Video Game Console Buyer](/): Hero, freight process, accepted console generations, recent lot photos, trust and compliance, manifest quote form, and FAQ.

## Key sections

- [Our Nationwide Freight Pickup Process](/#how): Four-step process — submit manifest, receive 24h offer, scheduled 48-state freight pickup, payout.
- [Who We Buy From](/#accepted): Independent Game Stores, Liquidation Centers, Repair Shops, Big Box Surplus, Returns Liquidation, Pawn Shops.
- [Supported Console Generations](/#accepted): Full list of accepted hardware and conditions.
- [Recent Lots](/#lots): Photos of recently purchased pallets and buyouts.
- [Trust & Compliance](/#trust): Secure commercial payments, 100% freight coverage, R2v3-aligned processing, EPA SmartWay, D-U-N-S registered.
- [Submit Inventory Manifest](/#quote): Form to submit a bulk inventory manifest for a guaranteed freight offer within 24 hours.
- [FAQ — Bulk Buying & Freight](/#faq): Answers about accepted inventory, freight pickup, minimum lot sizes, and payment timing.
